153.content: "our reigning champion Jormungandr, the most muscular, the strongest snake with the hardest body" and you see the famous snake coming out of the shadows https://tinyurl.com/yxd3lmk9 , you think to yourself that when he is going to return you will take the opportunity to escape then you look around you to see where he is coming in but you do not find a door then you look again at the snake which disappears then reappears in the ring you understand that it does not have no entry or exit because have teleported you let go of a breath of disappointment because your plan is to fall into the water snakes it this approach to your is said "then these you the little thing that will have to amuse me" you lift your eyes to look at his face because when he was in the ring you notice that size because your body is was small because if Jormungandr takes you in his hand he just had your head and your feet sticking out of his fist to give an example the duck on this video https://tinyurl.com/y33pzhf7 and a little taller than you
153.title: Jormungandr

info.description:
in this ring the anthros face off against the humans in a match of suffering.
anthros rarely lose, anthros are bigger than humans, in this world anthros are the king and humans are patetic to say if a human harms an anthro the human is sued but if a anthro hurts a human, the anthro has nothing and the police don't sense me.

during the match humans can win but if he wins the anthro is to send in the losers pit with the human who has won and it is very difficult to get out so he will be surrounded with other anthro and humans. if it's the anthro who wins, he will have to make a choice on humans, keep him for the day be leave him for the next fighter

rules:

no woman,
all forms of suffering authorized (crushing, odor, etc.),
no sex,
no death (people can be flattened but will remain alive and even concious),
anthros are big even the smallest anthro is bigger than a human (allow giant anthro),
the fight must be anthro vs human or anthro vs anthro,
possible to make a team match, 1vs1 1vs2 1vs3 2vs1 2vs2 3vs1 3vs2 3vs3 etc,
all fetish allowed,
vore authorized.
